notes: Chinese national standards administration. Publishes the GB (mandatory) and GB/T (recommended) standards series. SAC and the State Administration for Market Regulation (SAMR) jointly operate the standards portals std.samr.gov.cn and openstd.samr.gov.cn. Cybersecurity standards under TC260 (covered at secid:control/cn/org/tc260.json) are the most-cited subset; SAC is the broader parent for non-cyber-specific national standards. License posture: mostly paywalled with selective free access for mandatory GB standards.
